steps.title: What meaning does the blank need?
steps.content: "One way to evaluate a scholar's importance is to ______ other scholars' references to that research" — then gives the example of taking "a count of other scholars' citations." The blank must mean to count or tally.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The [word] needs to mean count or list references one by one. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — abridge: shorten or condense — this would reduce citations, not count them. ✗
  • Choice B — transpose: move to a different order or key — rearranging citations doesn't measure a scholar's importance. ✗
  • Choice C — enumerate: count or list items one by one — matches "a count of other scholars' citations" exactly. ✓
  • Choice D — circumvent: find a way around something — bypassing citations is the opposite of using them to evaluate importance. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
